rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0001
rows.name: Aaah! Tatsu spilled yogurt everywhere, mo~~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0002
rows.name: It's fine. Don't worry about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0004
rows.name:
Just as Tatsu thought, Lin-san
thinks Tatsu is cute, mo~~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0006
rows.name:
Okay, I'll preheat the oven, so
Tatsu, you get in the fridge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0007
rows.name:
Why the fridge, mo? Shouldn't
Tatsu wipe off the yogurt first, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0008
rows.name: Because the timing is perfect, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0009
rows.name:
I was thinking of making
tandoori chicken tonight♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0010
rows.name: N-n-n-no! Tatsu is not chicken, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110140_MSG0013
rows.name:
You did that on purpose, mo!
Definitely on purpose, mo~~![ST:wait ]
